summary.intent: Build a polished Electron/React app (gossamer) using Mantine UI with a GitHub-style dark/light theme, a chat-transcript-style session viewer, and the ability to spawn new Claude Code sessions from open items in checkpoint summaries.
summary.outcome: Fully migrated the UI to Mantine v7, implemented dark/light mode with light-dark() CSS throughout, redesigned the session detail page as a chat transcript with nested tool uses, added breadcrumb navigation, relative timestamps, and a functional spawn-session workflow that opens a new Terminal window via AppleScript and persists open item status to SQLite.

repo: Mantine v7 requires postcss-preset-mantine + postcss-simple-vars for CSS variable support; config goes in postcss.config.cjs
The gossamer indexer (src/indexer.ts) deletes and recreates OpenItem rows on every pass — must use upsert with unique constraint to preserve user-set status
Sessions are ordered by updatedAt desc in the server; frontend just renders API response order
The gossamer hook architecture: ~/.claude/settings.json hooks → claude-hook-handler stdin → SQLite DB → HTTP server at port 3000
Claude Code SDK query() calls the API directly (not the CLI), so gossamer hooks do NOT fire unless settingSources: ['user', 'project'] is passed — this loads ~/.claude/settings.json hooks
The CLAUDECODE env var blocks nested Claude Code sessions; must delete process.env.CLAUDECODE before calling query()
AppShell.Header spans full viewport width (above both navbar and main) — use it for controls that must always be visible regardless of sidebar state
light-dark(lightValue, darkValue) CSS function works in Electron/Chromium and reads color-scheme from the html element that Mantine sets
Mantine color variants X-0 (e.g. gray-0, teal-0) are always the lightest shade regardless of color scheme — never use them for dark-mode-aware backgrounds
CheckpointSessionMetadata.createdAt is the source of truth for checkpoint timestamps (CheckpointMetadata has no createdAt)
Claude Code app icon extracted via: iconutil -c iconset /Applications/Claude.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns

code.finding: groupClaudeTurns() merges consecutive toolGroup DisplayItems + following Stop event into a single claudeTurn RenderItem for chat transcript layout
CopyCell component wraps Table.Td with hover-triggered absolute ActionIcon for clipboard copy; activityDot() maps updatedAt thresholds (<2min=green, <15min=orange, else gray)
Shared TimeAgo component: relativeTime(iso) for display, absoluteTime(iso) for tooltip/copy, Tooltip wraps the text element
React context for header breadcrumb state; BreadcrumbProvider in App.tsx, useBreadcrumb() in Layout and child pages
Now uses prisma.openItem.upsert keyed on {checkpointSessionSummaryId, text} unique constraint to preserve status/subSessionId across re-indexing
POST /api/sessions/spawn uses osascript to open Terminal with claude prompt; PATCH /api/open-items/:id for status updates; spawn endpoint accepts openItemIds to batch-update to in_progress
OpenItem now has status String default 'open', subSessionId String?, and @@unique([checkpointSessionSummaryId, text]) for upsert support

workflow: Use AppShell.Header for always-visible controls in Electron apps with collapsible sidebars
For theme-aware colors in Mantine, prefer light-dark() over conditional styles or X-0 color variants
PNG assets imported in Vite/Electron need a .d.ts declaration: declare module '*.png' { const src: string; export default src; }
SDK-spawned Claude sessions only trigger gossamer hooks when settingSources: ['user', 'project'] is passed to query()

For cross-platform session spawning, AppleScript (osascript) works well on macOS for opening terminal windows; the user prefers option A (headless+resume) for platform agnosticism but accepted option B (AppleScript) for interactivity
When debugging silent failures in async fire-and-forget patterns, add explicit .catch() with console.error to surface errors

friction: Context window exhausted twice during this session requiring summary-based continuation, losing granular code context
CLAUDECODE env var silently blocked SDK spawning — no clear error, required manual investigation
Claude Code SDK query() bypasses CLI hooks entirely (calls API directly), which was not obvious from docs — required debugging to discover settingSources fix
Prisma upsert required adding a @@unique constraint and running db push --accept-data-loss to apply schema change

OpenItem table structure change broke existing UI because the type changed from string[] to object[] — caused 'Objects are not valid as React child' error in multiple places (SessionDetail, CheckpointDetail)
AppShell hamburger was placed in Main content area initially, making it hidden when sidebar was closed — required rethinking to AppShell.Header
Mantine X-0 color variants (gray-0, teal-0, etc.) appear to work in dark mode but are actually always light — took multiple fix passes to catch all instances
open_items: subSessionId is never actually populated in the DB — the AppleScript spawn opens a terminal but doesn't return a session ID to store back on the open items
The spawn workflow is macOS-only (AppleScript/osascript) despite user's stated preference for platform agnosticism
No real-time polling/WebSocket update after spawning — user must manually refresh to see the new session appear
CheckpointDetail.tsx may still have hardcoded light colors that weren't fully audited
SessionTree.tsx was rewritten but not audited for dark mode compliance in this session
The 'resume in terminal' flow (Option A) was never fully implemented — the current impl opens with the prompt directly, not --resume
Open item status is only persisted when explicitly changed via the UI — if the indexer re-indexes before the user acts, the status resets (mitigated by upsert fix but depends on unique key match)
